name: Abnormal Security
description: Abnormal Security — AI-based email security platform detecting BEC, phishing, and account takeover using behavioral baselines.

seo.title: Abnormal Security — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Abnormal Security: Abnormal Security — AI-based email security platform detecting BEC, phishing, and account takeover using behavioral baselines.

when_to_use: BEC detection via behavioral baseline for finance teams
Account takeover prevention for M365 and Google Workspace
Phishing triage automation to reduce SOC alert fatigue
Vendor email compromise detection for AP workflows
Executive impersonation alerts for high-risk inboxes

pros: Behavioral AI catches BEC that signature-based gateways miss
API-based deployment skips MX record changes
Strong account takeover detection via login anomalies
Post-delivery remediation auto-claws back phishing emails
cons: Enterprise-only pricing with opaque per-mailbox quotes
Requires Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, no on-prem
Baseline learning period delays full protection
Limited visibility into detection logic for tuning
review.verdict: Best-in-class AI email security for M365 shops with budget; overkill and pricey for smaller orgs.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large enterprises on M365 fighting BEC, vendor fraud, and executive impersonation.
review.not_for: Small teams, on-prem Exchange, or orgs wanting transparent, predictable licensing.

lock_in.reason: Email security integrates via O365/Gmail API so portable

developer_experience.reason: Security ops platform, not a developer-facing API
